name: survey-builder-ai-mcp
description: AI-powered survey builder ai MCP server for agents. Supports create survey, validate questions, analyze responses. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: create_survey
tools.description: Create a new survey with questions. Optionally specify question types per question.

tools.name: validate_questions
tools.description: Validate survey questions for clarity, bias, leading language, and best practices.

tools.name: analyze_responses
tools.description: Analyze survey responses. Provide either a survey_id (for stored data) or a list of response dicts.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a summary report for a survey with key findings and recommendations.
